data.title: Norsk Hydro Non-GAAP EPS of NOK1.49, revenue of NOK50.09B
data.description:
• Norsk Hydro press release (OTCQX:NHYDY): Q3 Non-GAAP EPS of NOK1.49.
  • Revenue of NOK50.09B (+12.1% Y/Y).
  • Compared to the second quarter 2024, Hydro’s adjusted EBITDA increased from NOK 5,839 million to NOK 7,367 million in the third quarter 2024. Higher realized aluminium and alumina prices combined with lower fixed costs were partly offset by lower Extrusions and recycling volume.

data.title: Barclays reports Q3 results
data.description:
• Barclays press release (NYSE:BCS): Q3 Group income of £6.5bn was up 5% year-on-year, with Group NII excluding IB and Head Office of £2.8bn, of whichBarclays UK NII was £1.7bn.
  • Attributable profit of £1.56B, up 23% from thr prior year.
  • Earnings per share of 10.7p.
  • Group statutory RoTE of 12.3%.
  • Guidance for 2024 Group Net Interest Income excluding Investment Bank and Head Office increased fromc.£11.0bn to greater than £11.0bn. Within this Barclays UK NII guidance increased from c.£6.3bn to c.£6.5bn
  • TNAV per share of 351p

data.title: Singtel to sell Dash to Western Union
data.description:
• Singtel and Western Union (NYSE:WU) announced a conditional agreement for the sale of Dash, Singapore's all-in-one mobile wallet.
  • This transaction is part of Singtel's strategy to streamline its operations and focus on core business areas, while Western Union (WU) aims to enhance its digital financial services.
  • “In line with our Group’s Singtel28 strategy to focus on our core business and competencies, we have decided that Western Union is best placed to bring Dash to the next level. We will work closely with Western Union to ensure that our Dash customers and business partners continue to be well-supported and the transition is seamless.” said Ms Anna Yip, Deputy CEO of Singtel Singapore.
  • Western Union (WU) stock price rose 1.1% on Thursday during pre-marke hours of trading.

data.title: Hopefield Ventures Two to acquire Carrier Connect Systems
data.description:
• Hopefield Ventures Two (HVII.P:CA) to acquire Carrier Connect Systems, a private arm’s length company that operates a Tier II/III data center in Vancouver, British Columbia.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Canadian miner Roscan Gold reports debt settlement
data.description:
• Roscan Gold (TSXV:ROS:CA) has settled an outstanding promissory note in the amount of $677,000 through the issuance of 10,371,667 common shares in the capital of the company at a price of $0.09 a piece, it said late on Wednesday.
  • The vendor has agreed that it shall not, without the prior written consent of the company, sell, or otherwise dispose of more than 150,000 common shares on any one trading day.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Kovo HealthTech announces name change to Kovo+
data.description:
•  Kovo HealthTech (TSXV:KOVO:CA) will be changing its name from "Kovo HealthTech Corporation" to "Kovo+ Holdings Inc.", effective pre-market open on October 28, 2024.

  • "Along with our upcoming rebrand, the Name Change more accurately reflects our evolving focus and marks the Company's pivot to broader opportunities while continuing to build upon its continued focus on the healthcare sector," said Brenner Adams, Interim CEO.

data.title: Bowhead Specialty prices secondary offering at $29 per share
data.description:
• Bowhead Specialty (NYSE:BOW) priced an underwritten secondary public offering of 4M shares at $29.00 per share.
  • Underwriters have a 30-day option to purchase up to an additional 600,000 shares.
  • The company is not selling any shares of its common stock in the offering and will not receive any of the proceeds from the sale.
  • The offering is expected to close on October 25, 2024.
  • The stock price gained 1.7% on Wednesday during after hours of trading.

data.title: Mercer International prices $200M senior notes
data.description:
• Mercer International (NASDAQ:MERC) priced its private offering of $200M in aggregate principal amount of 12.875% senior notes due October 1, 2028.
  • The additional notes are being issued at a price of 103.000% of their principal amount, plus accrued interest from October 1, 2024, for a yield to worst of 11.624%.
  • The net proceeds, along with cash on hand, will be used by the company to redeem $300M in principal amount of its currently outstanding 5.500% senior notes due 2026.

data.description:
